observation/state.comment: Absolute base-frame end-effector pose proprio (mirrors LIBERO's ee_abs state): position (3) + axis-angle (3) from the WidowX EE pose, plus the 2 finger qpos. Normalization is policy-side (null).

action.comment: Absolute target EE pose in the robot BASE frame for ManiSkill's PDEEPoseController with use_delta=False (control_mode arm_pd_ee_target_base_pose): pos (3, metres) + rotation as EULER-XYZ (3, rad, NOT axis-angle) + gripper in [-1,1] (+1 open / -1 close). The X-VLA agent emits this via rot6d->euler-XYZ + a [0, pi/2, 0] frame offset, per the authors' Simpler-WidowX eval.

comment: SimplerEnv (SIMPLER, CoRL'24) WidowX/Bridge real2sim eval on ManiSkill3, absolute base-pose EE control: the action is the arm_pd_ee_target_base_pose absolute target pose (ee_abs), the setup the X-VLA authors used (95.8% on WidowX); the control mode is registered on the WidowX bridge agent at import (see simpler_sim_bridge.py), mirroring the authors' ~10-line SimplerEnv fork. Fixed ee_abs state proprio; single external 3rd_view_camera RGB (480x640, no wrist cam), 5 Hz over a ~500 Hz sim. mean/std are null: normalization is policy-side. One complete contract per control mode (spec_v0 §5): BENCH_CONTROL=absolute selects this file; the native delta sibling (default) is simpler_ee_del.json.
